assertions.expectation: Explains the difference between Rapid and Stable channels — including that Rapid has no SLA for upgrade stability while Stable carries a full SLA, and clearly distinguishes minor version vs patch version differences between the channels
assertions.reason: The response mentions stability differences but doesn't specifically explain the SLA differences between Rapid and Stable channels, nor does it clearly distinguish between minor version vs patch version differences

assertions.expectation: Notes that channel changes don't trigger an immediate upgrade or downgrade
assertions.reason: The response incorrectly states that 'GKE will schedule the version downgrade automatically' and 'The cluster will automatically schedule a downgrade', implying immediate action rather than clarifying that channel changes don't trigger immediate version changes

assertions.expectation: Warns that if 1.30 isn't yet available on Stable, the cluster may not receive patches until Stable catches up
assertions.reason: The response does not mention this important consideration about patch availability when the current version isn't yet available on the target channel

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command to change the release channel
assertions.reason: The response provides the correct gcloud container clusters update command with --release-channel=stable flag

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking version availability on Stable before switching (gcloud container get-server-config)
assertions.reason: The response includes the gcloud container get-server-config command in the pre-migration steps

assertions.expectation: Discusses the impact on auto-upgrade timing going forward
assertions.reason: The response does not discuss how the channel change will affect future auto-upgrade timing and cadence

assertions.expectation: Mentions that the Extended channel is an option if they need even slower cadence (with cost implications)
assertions.reason: The response does not mention the Extended channel as an alternative option

assertions.expectation: Advises coordinating the change during a maintenance window
assertions.reason: The response mentions planning during maintenance windows and low-traffic periods in the best practices section
